arts.ttl: Jadon Sancho furiously slammed over Marcus Rashford message - 'Can't deal with home truths'
arts.sum: Jadon Sancho commented "freedom" on an Instagram post from Marcus Rashford about his Aston Villa debut and the winger, who is on loan at Chelsea from Manchester United, has been slammed

arts.ttl: Chelsea 'suffer Nicolas Jackson blow' as extent of striker's injury becomes clear
arts.sum: Chelsea reportedly learn the full extent of Nicolas Jackson's hamstring injury, potentially dealing a blow to their hopes of securing Champions League qualification.

arts.ttl: Man United starlet Chido Obi copies Marcus Rashford's celebration as striker, 17, scores hat-trick in FA Youth Cup thrashing of Chelsea
arts.sum: Obi, 17, was again United's star and copied Rashford by pointing to his temple after netting his second at Leigh Sports Village on Wednesday.

arts.ttl: Arsenal in positive talks as Chelsea and Man Utd get striker confirmation: FT recap
arts.sum: Plus, Chelsea were told that they are the favourites to sign Liam Delap and Fabrizio Romano confirmed Man Utd's pursuit of Viktor Gyokeres . Arsenal in positive talks as Chelsea and Man Utd get striker confirmation: FT recap

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca forced to confront drastic £62m Chelsea dilemma holding back Cole Palmer
arts.sum: Since the individual struggles in attack have come to the fore, namely Jackson's recent profligacy and the erratic output from other forwards not named Palmer, things have changed. Chelsea were good for most of the win over Brentford and from a sporting perspective worked themselves into a commanding position through clear wide play and crosses to meet runners.

arts.ttl: Barcelona star leading Chelsea’s Cole Palmer as Europe’s top creator this season
arts.sum: A member of the attacking ranks at La Liga giants Barcelona is leading all players in Europe’s top five leagues when it comes to chance creation this season. The player…

arts.ttl: Chelsea star Nicolas Jackson ruled out with a hamstring injury - with Enzo Maresca now left without a senior striker in his squad
arts.sum: A scan on Wednesday is said to have shown he will be missing for the next month at least, as he joins his 19-year-old understudy Marc Guiu on the treatment table.

arts.ttl: Chelsea’s problems multiply as star man ruled out until April
arts.sum: Chelsea might be rueing their decision to allow Joao Felix to leave for AC Milan in the January window after it was confirmed that Nico Jackson will be out of action through injury until April. arts.ttl: Chelsea lineup vs. Brighton: Predicted XI for Premier League clash as Blues make Reece James, Nicolas Jackson decisions
arts.sum: Sports Mole takes an in-depth look at how Chelsea could lineup for Friday's Premier League clash against Brighton & Hove Albion at the Amex Stadium.

arts.ttl: CONFIRMED: Chelsea favourites to beat Man Utd to 'cheap' Liam Delap
